name: Squash Parmesan Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 small yellow crooked neck squash (4 to 6)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the squash.
2. Place the squash and onions in a 1 1/2 quart glass casserole dish.
3. Add 1/4 cup of water to the dish and cover it with a lid.
4. Microwave on high for 10-14 minutes.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the dish.
6. Stir in salt and pepper.
7. In a separate bowl, combine cracker crumbs and parmesan cheese.
8. Add melted margarine to the mixture and stir until well combined.
9. Sprinkle the cracker crumb mixture evenly over the top of the vegetables.
10. Cover the dish with its lid again and microwave for 2-3 minutes.
11. Let the casserole stand for 3 to 5 minutes before serving.
